message:
feat(guard): implement conflict detection with reservation reading and rename handling

Add full guard conflict detection: read file reservations from archive JSON files,
symmetric fnmatch matching (Python parity), staged path extraction with rename support,
push path extraction, gate/bypass controls, and expiry-aware filtering. 34 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
